name: EFF: Door-to-Door Freedom Tour
objective: Mobilize the poor and working class around land and minimum wage.
mainMessage: EFF: Economic Freedom in Our Lifetime. We are here to reclaim our land and our dignity.
talkingPoints: Land: Expropriation without compensation for the poor.
Wage: Fighting for a national minimum wage of R12,500.
Health: Refurbishing local clinics and ending tenderpreneurship.

name: EFF: Village Peoples Council
objective: Engage traditional leaders and rural communities on land rights.
mainMessage: Land is Dignity: Power to the people through ownership.
talkingPoints: Traditional: Respecting our Kings and Chiefs through empowerment.
Services: Quality water and electricity for every rural household.

name: EFF: Johannesburg CBD Broadcast
objective: Mass awareness of insourcing victories and university fee protests.
mainMessage: EFF: Stand for Student Rights! Join the march to the Dept of Education tomorrow at 9 AM.

name: EFF: Land and Economic Freedom Rally
objective: Mobilize support for expropriation of land without compensation and industrialization.
mainMessage: Economic Freedom in Our Lifetime: Reclaiming our land and nationalizing our mines for the benefit of all.
talkingPoints: Land Expropriation: Dignity begins with land ownership.
Free Education: Quality higher education for the poor.
